title: Module 1
content:
ROS Fundamentals:
ROS Graph,ROS master, roscore, Catkin: Workspaces and ROS Packages,
rosrun, Names, Namespaces, and Remapping Using roslaunch, tf: Coordinate
Transforms - Poses, Positions, and Orientations, Publishing to a Topic,
Subscribing to a Topic, Latched Topic,  Defining Message Types, Mixing
Publishers and Subscribers

title: Module 2
content:
Services and Actions:
Defining a Service, implementing a Service, Using a Service, Defining an
Action, Implementing a Basic Action Server, Using an Action, Implementing
a More Sophisticated Action Server, Using the More Sophisticated Action.

title: Module 3
content:
Robots and Simulators:
Subsystems - Actuation: Mobile Platform, Actuation: Manipulator Arm,
Sensors, Computation Complete Robots – PR2, Fetch, Robonaut 2,
TurtleBot, Simulators – Stage, Gazebo. Other Simulators

title: Module 4
content:
Building Maps of the World and Navigating About the World:
Maps
in
ROS-representation
and
formats,
SLAM
(Simultaneous
Localization and Mapping), rosbag and its functionalities, Recording and
playing back data, Techniques for building maps from sensor data,
GMapping and Cartographer for mapping, Map Server in ROS, Loading and
serving maps, localization techniques (e.g., AMCL), Implementing
localization in ROS.
